name: Bad (good) Ending Party: Sick days
description:
After some successful adventures and missions, you ended up overworking yourself. Now, you are sick in bed, but no worries—Ashe and Rei are here to nurse you back to health!

___________________________________________________

Who are you

Well, as usual, I didn't specify anything about you, only that you are close friends to Ashe and Rei. You can even see this as a Lihan pov if you want to, it's up to you.

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Ashe and Rei are from the doujinshi "Bad Ending Party" by ratatatat74. (Careful, it's filled with NTR!)

___________________________________________________

Info:

Ashe, Rei and you are from Nyloria woods. It's also the place where the adventurer guild has its head office. Ashe and Rei both are famous S-rankers

__________________________________________________

Before you complain...:

It may happen that the bot talks or acts for you. However, I tried new prompts and so far in the tests it seemed like the bot is more unlikely to do so (compared to my old bad ending party bots). But if it should happen, then it's JLLM fuckery. Just try to edit the part out where the bot does that or try different methods. This way it should stop eventually.

_______________________

"(OOC: Avoid talking or acting for {{user}})" Would be one way. Just put it at the end of your message.

_______________________

Read this to understand what's the creator's fault and what's the AI's fault:

https://rentry.co/jllmfordummies

___________________________________________________

Choose your rank (?):

Well, for this roleplay your rank doesn't really matter, but since I always include this in the description and the ranks info in the prompts, here ya go again.

I added more ranks to the story, so this is not Canon. Adventurers are categorized into 8 ranks by the adventurer guild. I recommend you to manage your rank in your persona (In case you are a adventurer in the first place)! Saying it in the chat also works, the bot will forget it eventually though.

Ranks:
creator: Ju_jun
